ead.archdesc:
======= RMM02959Ithaca movie industry photograph collection2959Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
September 20132B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
finart rghisThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:32:46 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Ithaca movie industry photograph collection
Hennessy, Mame
2959
.3 cubic feet. .3 cubic feet.
1915-1965. Photographs Photographs of movie actors and actresses, movie sets in Ithaca, New York, scenes from movies and various public events in Ithaca. Collection material in English 2068257
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
September 2013
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, September 2013
Date modified:
RMC Staff, September 2013
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Ithaca, New York was a silent film center from 1910 through the 1920s. The Wharton Brothers Studio was located in Renwick (now Stewart) Park.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Photographs of movie actors and actresses, movie sets in Ithaca, New York, scenes from movies and various public events in Ithaca, collected by actress Mame (Mary L.) Hennessy. Also, personal photographs of Mary Hennessy, her family, friends and residences; letters and postcards, 1917-1964; news clippings, 1917, 1949-1961; miscellaneous manuscript and printed material, 1947-1965; and photographic negatives. Includes photographs of Irene Castle, Grace Darling, Doris Kenyon, Derwent Hall Caine, Florence Short, Marguerrete Marsh, Lillian Walker, Betty Howe, Frances White, Pearl White, Jean Sothern, Elsie Baker, Evelyn Ferris, Dick Steward, Eddie Kaw, E. Coit Albertson, and Creighton Hale.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Photographs
Subseries Ia. Still Photographs of Actors and Actresses Subseries Ib. Movie Sets, Lots, and Shooting Subseries Ic. Scenes from Movies Pre-1928 Subseries Id. Various Public Events in Ithaca Subseries Ie. Personal Photographs
Series II. Letters and Postcards
Series III. Miscellaneous Printed Material
Series IV. News Clippings
Cite As:
Ithaca movie industry photograph collection, #2959. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Tompkins County (N.Y.) Ithaca (N.Y.) Women in the motion picture industry. Motion picture studios -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Motion picture actors and actresses. Albertson, E. Coit. Caine, Derwent Hall. Castle, Irene, 1893-1969. Darling, Grace, 1893-1963. Farris, Evelyn. Howe, Betty. Kaw, Eddie. Baker, Elsie. Hale, Creighton. Kenyon, Doris. Marsh, Marguerrete. Sothern, Jean. Stewart, Dick. Thixton, Lillian Walker. White, Frances. White, Pearl, 1889-1938. Hennessy, Mary L. Wharton Studio (Ithaca, N.Y.)

Court Street, Coral Gables, Unidentified houses (most likely in Florida). 6 items.17Group shots without Mary Hennessy. 62 items.17Mary Hennessy alone. 18 items18Miscellaneous. 14 items18Miscellaneous negatives. 21 itemsID #I18Series II. Treman thanking Mame for being hostess at Democratic Dinner at Ithaca HotelID #F11October 1, 195219Mimeo. letter and coupon stub from Community PlayersID #F121952-195319Letter from James Farley, enclosing picture of him and grandson with Pope Paul VIID #F13April 17, 196419Series III.
